predictionUnderP01: P01 predicts field-complete subject/source evidence downgrades random-only claim
predictionUnderP02: P02 predicts claim-safety change matters even if metric gain is absent
predictionUnderP03: P03 predicts replay cannot alone settle subject protocol claim
expectedObservation: group/source split vs random with negative control
falsifier: supports field boundary if subject/source fields change claim label
requiredDataOrRepo: public data or public package metadata only
baseline: simple load/import or logistic baseline where relevant
negativeControl: shuffled label, protocol-absent control, or failed import control as relevant
metric: claim-safety label plus accuracy/macro-F1 where relevant
replayPlan: container-netoff or public evidence hash replay when feasible
